历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 2664 → 2353 → 6481 → 4750 → 5483. In 2023, an abnormal high value of 6481 occurred due to a gap in enrollment, and in the past two years it has gradually returned to the range of about 4750–5483. The baseline for 2025 is about 5483. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 223 → 227 → 222 → 205 → 214 respectively. In 2026, the plan increases to 226, an expansion of about 5.6% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 15th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a continuous rise in recent years (from 17th in 2021 to 15th in 2026), firmly among the top engineering universities in the country. In 2023, reputation was slightly negative (teacher ethics incident), but in the 2026 reputation document, there is no negative record for Southeast University. Douyin popularity ranks 31st overall (relatively hot), short video exposure is at an upper-middle level, and application attention is stable. No obvious enrollment gap records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 18 disciplines were rated A- or above, including A+ in Architecture, A+ in Civil Engineering, A+ in Transportation Engineering, A+ in Electronic Science and Technology, A+ in Biomedical Engineering, etc., with extremely outstanding engineering strength, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core enrollment majors of Southeast University, such as Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Computer Science, are all in high-demand or recommended status. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao candidates in Anhui Province is about 451,000, with an estimated Physics Category of about 313,000 based on recent proportions, a slight decrease from 321,000 in 2025, easing competition pressure. Southeast University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong regional appeal to Anhui candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Anhui is about 2.8% (2025), placing it in the upper-middle range among cross-provincial enrollments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the approximately 5.6% enrollment expansion in 2026 leading to a backward shift in ranking, a slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category candidates in Anhui Province easing competition, continuous improvement in school level, and strong appeal of advantageous disciplines, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward based on the 2025 baseline of 5483. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5697, with a range of 5167–6167.
